case_title: CRAIG ANGELICH ET AL VS. CHRISTIAN DAVID

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-15-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF CRAIG ANGELICH.
